author: UnderCurve
description: Homebridge is a lightweight NodeJS server you can run on your home network that emulates the iOS HomeKit API. It supports Plugins, which are community-contributed modules that provide a basic bridge from HomeKit to various 3rd-party APIs provided by manufacturers of "smart home" devices.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Latest upstream release v1.9.0 adds updateDisplayName().
- It fixes handleUpdatePlatformAccessories() and allows Characteristic.SerialNumber to be set through config.json.
- The release includes minor dependency updates and uses hap-nodejs v0.12.3.
